originalTitle: Live RL dev on PufferLib with Joseph Suarez
title: Reviewing Jonah's Pull Request on Kernel Refactoring for PufferLib
summary: Reviewed Jonah's PR with custom kernels for PufferLib. Rejected the structural refactoring that split kernels into many files and added torch dependencies, but approved integrating the select, copy, pryo, and advantage kernel improvements. Also cleaned up logging and sweep configuration code.
